//: v7.6.3 — Reconstructed from project conventions; original config was missing from the v7.6.3 ZIP (Bug C in the v7.6.3 erweiterte Analyse). Selective check pattern: files opt in via // @ts-check (201 files at v7.6.3), allowJs: true, .d.ts files in types/ provide ambient typing. Known issue: 27 residual TS errors in 6 files (AdaptivePromptStrategy, ExecutionProvenance, AdaptiveStrategyApply, CausalAnnotation, GoalSynthesizer, AutoUpdater) all stem from the subscription-helper mixin pattern (applySubscriptionHelper(this) grafts _sub() and _unsubAll() onto instances dynamically). Follow-up: add JSDoc @mixes decl on subscription-helper.js so these files re-enter the typecheck scope cleanly. Until then, npm run typecheck exits 2 with these known errors but does not block npm run ci (which does not call tsc); npm run ci:full does call tsc.
